title: Gadget Generations
editorialSummary: Consumer gadgets grouped by the decade they were first sold to mass-market consumers; the false trail is that the Walkman (1979) and the CD player (1982) are both Sony portable audio devices and solvers may group them together, but the Walkman belongs to the 1970s launch cohort and the CD player firmly belongs to the 1980s.
